entries.reason: Initial deploy with transient hot-keypair authority (Ledger Solana app rejected solana-cli 4.0.0-rc.0 deploy tx with 'invalid header'; hot keypair used as workaround).

Transfer authority from transient hot keypair to Squads multisig (1-of-2; members anil 9bRQgY + sattvik 6teWDe2s). Note: actual on-chain owner program is Squads Smart Account (SMPLecH534NA9acpos4G6x7uf3LWbCAwZQE9e8ZekMu) rather than the older Squads V4 program (SQDS4ep65T869zMMBKyuUq6aD6EgTu8psMjkvj52pCf); registry schema's 'squads-v4-multisig' enum value is the closest available label and behavior is functionally equivalent.
